sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Boosts Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) Price Target to $425.00
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has increased its price target for Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) from $384.00 to $425.00, reiterating a "buy" rating for the aerospace company. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price targets, with the stock currently holding an average "Hold" rating and a target price of $343.63. The article also details recent stock performance, quarterly earnings, insider trading activity, and institutional investor changes.

feed.title: Everest hands Cellura and Gallagher new senior reinsurance roles
feed.summary: Everest Group has announced two key leadership appointments within its facultative and hybrid reinsurance business. Michael Cellura has been appointed as the head of the unit, while Trevor Gallagher will serve as its chief operating officer.

feed.title: AI Needs Power Now-Bloom Energy and American Electric Power Deliver
feed.summary: The energy sector is seeing a shift from green dreams to commercial necessity, driven by the massive energy demands of artificial intelligence. Bloom Energy and American Electric Power have signed a landmark $2.65 billion deal for 1 gigawatt of solid oxide fuel cells to power data centers, bypassing traditional grid limitations. This collaboration addresses the immediate need for reliable baseload power for AI infrastructure, positioning both companies as key players in fulfilling current energy demands.

feed.title: Analysts’ Top Financial Picks: Prudential Financial (PRU), First Horizon (FHN)
feed.summary: Analysts have issued neutral ratings for Prudential Financial (PRU) and First Horizon (FHN), indicating market experts are neither strongly bullish nor bearish on these stocks. Morgan Stanley analyst Bob Huang maintained a Hold rating on Prudential Financial with a price target of $120.00, while Evercore ISI's John Pancari also maintained a Hold rating on First Horizon with a price target of $26.00. The consensus among analysts for Prudential Financial is a Hold with a 4.1% upside, and for First Horizon, it is a Moderate Buy with a 10.5% upside, despite a recent downgrade to Hold by TipRanks – OpenAI.

feed.title: Oh, Baby! KRISPY KREME® Celebrates First Birthday of Baby Delivered in Krispy Kreme Parking Lot with Zero Delivery this Wednesday-Thursday
feed.summary: Krispy Kreme is celebrating the first birthday of "Baby Dallas," who was born in a Krispy Kreme parking lot during a snowstorm on January 22, 2025. To mark the occasion, the company is offering zero delivery fees on all doughnut orders placed through its website and app this Wednesday and Thursday. The promotion also highlights Krispy Kreme's new Winter Seasonal Collection, featuring unique doughnut flavors.

feed.title: Fifth Third CEO reveals early closing date for $10.9 billion Comerica acquisition
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp is accelerating its $10.9 billion acquisition of Comerica Inc., with CEO Tim Spence announcing an early closing date of February 1st. The bank plans an aggressive expansion in Texas following the acquisition, including opening 150 new branches and launching a significant consumer marketing campaign, which will be the first for those locations in over a decade. This move underscores Fifth Third's strategy to strengthen its market presence and integrate Comerica's operations efficiently.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: F5, Inc. (FFIV) Shareholders Who Lost Money
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP is reminding F5, Inc. (FFIV) investors who suffered losses during the Class Period (October 28, 2024, to October 27, 2025) of the upcoming February 17, 2026 deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that F5 concealed a significant security incident involving a nation-state threat actor gaining unauthorized access to its systems, which led to two significant drops in F5's stock price after the disclosures. Investors are urged to contact Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP to inquire about pursuing claims.

feed.title: Has Alphabet Stock Hit Its Top at $4 Trillion?
feed.summary: Alphabet (GOOGL) recently reached a $4 trillion market cap, following Nvidia (NVDA) and signing a partnership with Apple (AAPL) for AI technology. However, GOOGL experienced losses after hitting this peak, a pattern observed with other megacaps like Apple and Nvidia, suggesting a "hangover" effect. While short-term pullbacks are common after reaching such significant market cap milestones, historical data indicates a positive long-term outlook for these stocks, with most beating the S&P 500 over a year.

feed.title: WIZARDS OF THE COAST PARTNERS WITH TOP CREATORS TO BRING DUNGEONS & DRAGONS TO FORTNITE
feed.summary: Wizards of the Coast, a subsidiary of Hasbro, has announced a collaboration with Chartis and Teravision Games, leading Fortnite Island creators, to bring Dungeons & Dragons-inspired experiences to Fortnite. This initiative includes five custom islands built by D&D fans using Epic's UEFN toolset, offering new ways for players to engage with the D&D universe within Fortnite, featuring familiar locations and legendary creatures from the Forgotten Realms. Players can now explore these new experiences using specific Island Codes, marking an experimental step to introduce D&D to a broader audience.

feed.title: Roper Technologies stock hits 52-week low at $407.01
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) stock has hit a 52-week low of $407.01, representing a 23.2% decline over the past year. Despite its "GOOD" financial health rating and 35 consecutive years of dividend payments, the company faces market volatility, AI threats, and cyclical headwinds, leading to recent analyst downgrades. Roper is addressing these challenges by appointing new AI executives.

feed.title: These Analysts Revise Their Forecasts On Regions Financial Following Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp (NYSE: RF) reported weaker-than-expected Q4 earnings, missing analyst estimates for both earnings per share and sales. Following the announcement, analysts from Piper Sandler and Wells Fargo revised their price targets, with Piper Sandler raising its target to $31 and Wells Fargo lowering its target to $28. Regions Financial's CEO highlighted solid growth in 2025 and an optimistic outlook for 2026, citing improving economic trends and strong capital position.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal Provides $73M Acquisition Loan for Virginia Beach Retail Complex
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal has provided a $73.4 million acquisition loan to Yale Realty Services for the purchase of the Landstown Commons Shopping Center in Virginia Beach, Va. The 408,000-square-foot retail complex was acquired by Yale Realty Services for $102 million from an undisclosed REIT. Yale Paprin, president of Yale Realty Services, highlighted the property's appeal due to high employment statistics and demographic diversity in the Virginia Beach submarket.

feed.title: €51.11 after hours: Freeport-McMoRan FPMB.DE XETRA 20 Jan 2026 earnings preview
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FPMB.DE) stock moved to €51.11 after hours on January 20, 2026, ahead of its earnings report on January 22, 2026. The article provides an earnings preview focusing on financials, valuation, technicals, and Meyka AI model forecasts, highlighting the importance of copper prices and margin guidance. While technicals are bullish, Meyka AI projects potential downside for the stock from its current price.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Raises Price Target for EVRG to $79, Maintains Equal-Weight Rating | EVRG Stock News
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Evergy (EVRG) to $79 from $77, while maintaining an Equal-Weight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated analyst sentiment for the regulated electric utility, which serves eastern Kansas and western Missouri. Despite the raise, the GuruFocus estimated GF Value suggests a potential downside compared to the current market price.

feed.title: American Water Works (AWK) Price Target Lowered by Wells Fargo |
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for American Water Works (AWK) from $142.00 to $126.00, while maintaining an Equal-Weight rating. This adjustment reflects an 11.27% decrease in the price target, coming amidst various recent analyst rating updates for the company. Despite the downward revision from Wells Fargo, the average target price from 10 analysts is $142.34, suggesting an 8.81% upside from the current price, with a consensus "Hold" recommendation.

feed.title: Moon Capital Initiates Position in Molina Healthcare (MOH) at $160 After $300 Peak
feed.summary: Moon Capital Management has initiated a position in Molina Healthcare (MOH) at approximately $160 in Q4 2025, despite the stock having peaked at $300 six months prior. This move indicates a bullish long-term outlook, with analyst price targets averaging $180.85 and several firms upgrading their ratings or raising price targets for MOH. The company is also implementing a stock buyback program to boost EPS, further supported by investor confidence.

feed.title: S&P Global Ratings Projects Macau Casino Sector Growth to Slow to 3%-7% by 2026
feed.summary: S&P Global Ratings forecasts that Macau's casino sector revenue growth will decelerate to 3%-7% year-on-year by 2026, down from 9.1% in 2025, primarily due to near-full hotel occupancy and limited new capacity. Despite this slowdown, Las Vegas Sands and MGM are expected to gain market share in the mass market segment, driven by new hotel openings and recovering demand. Analyst sentiment remains positive for Macau casino stocks, with current valuations considered undemanding, particularly for WYNN and LVS.

feed.title: John Deere Acquires Tenna to Power Smart Fleet Tools
feed.summary: John Deere has announced its acquisition of Tenna, a US construction technology specialist, to enhance its digital tools for managing mixed equipment fleets. Tenna will operate independently, continuing to offer its software directly to contractors to improve visibility and workflow automation for construction equipment. This acquisition aligns with John Deere's strategy to expand its digital capabilities and data-led services for customers managing diverse fleets.

feed.title: Blackstone Partners with OneDigital to Introduce Private Equity into 401(k) Plans
feed.summary: Blackstone, Apollo Management, and Ares Management are partnering with OneDigital to integrate private equity and private credit into 401(k) plans and other defined-benefit retirement accounts. This collaboration aims to provide everyday investors with access to private market investments, which are expected to offer growth, income, and long-term stability. The investments will be part of OneDigital's Personalized Portfolio program, subject to strict due diligence and fiduciary review.

feed.title: YUM: Morgan Stanley Maintains Rating but Raises Price Target | YUM Stock News
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst John Glass has maintained an 'Equal-Weight' rating on Yum Brands (YUM) but raised the price target from $165 to $176, indicating a 6.67% increase. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on YUM's future performance. The article also provides historical analyst ratings and a detailed overview of Yum Brands' global presence and financial structure.

feed.title: Boston Scientific stock rating reiterated at Outperform by Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho has reiterated an Outperform rating on Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) with a price target of $140.00 after the company announced its intention to acquire Penumbra for $15 billion. The acquisition, which adds thrombectomy and embolization devices to Boston Scientific's portfolio, is expected to be finalized by the end of 2026 and become accretive within two years. Boston Scientific maintains its long-range goals for double-digit adjusted EPS growth through 2028, independent of this acquisition.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Gauzy, Ltd. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Gauzy, Ltd. (NASDAQ: GAUZ) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between March 11, 2025, and November 13, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Gauzy failed to disclose that three of its French subsidiaries were nearing insolvency, which would likely trigger a default on the Company's senior secured debt facilities. Investors have until February 6, 2025, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: Envirotech Vehicles’ Stock Skyrockets as AZIO AI Partnership Blossoms
feed.summary: Envirotech Vehicles Inc.'s stock surged by 7.61% following AZIO AI's announcement of a significant order for Nvidia GPUs, projecting $107M in revenue. This partnership, which involves AZIO AI becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary, reflects a strategic shift for Envirotech into AI-centric markets and has dramatically boosted investor confidence. The move aims to revolutionize Envirotech’s offerings and foster growth despite previous financial hurdles.

feed.title: 12 Information Technology Stocks Moving In Tuesday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article identifies 12 information technology stocks that experienced significant movement during Tuesday's intraday trading session. It details the top gainers, including Signing Day Sports, Black Titan, and Auddia, noting their percentage increases and market caps. The article also lists the biggest losers, such as Locafy, Creative Global Technology, and Saverone 2014, with their respective percentage decreases and market capitalizations.

feed.title: Digital-First Banking & Payments
feed.summary: Black Titan Corporation (NASDAQ:BTTC) is focusing on digital-first banking and payment solutions to cater to a new generation of consumers who expect instant, intuitive, and mobile financial services. The company, which was formed in 2024 and renamed in 2025, is expanding its platform to support data-driven digital asset initiatives, positioning itself at the forefront of this evolving financial landscape.

feed.title: Ecopetrol Announces Hydrocarbon-Producing Departments' Nominee to the Board of Directors on Slate Proposed by Government of Colombia
feed.summary: Ecopetrol S.A. announced that Mr. Ricardo Rodriguez Yee has been nominated by the hydrocarbon-producing departments as their candidate for the Board of Directors. This nominee will be presented for shareholder election as the eighth director on the slate proposed by the Government of Colombia. Ecopetrol is the largest company in Colombia and a major integrated energy company in the Americas, with extensive operations in hydrocarbon production, transportation, and refining, as well as significant international presence in energy transmission and other sectors.

feed.title: Churchill Downs Invests $200M to Launch Rockingham Grand Casino
feed.summary: Churchill Downs Inc. (CDI) is investing between $180 million and $200 million to transform Casino Salem into the new Rockingham Grand Casino in Salem, New Hampshire. This development includes 825 historical racing machines, 32 table games, 12 electronic table games, restaurants, and a 900-seat live music venue, targeting a mid-2027 opening. The project aims to attract visitors from the Boston region and contribute to New Hampshire charities, aligning with the state's evolving gambling laws and CDI's strong financial performance.

feed.title: Welltower Announces Date of Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
feed.summary: Welltower Inc. (NYSE: WELL) announced it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, after market close. The company will then host a conference call and webcast on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. Investors can access the event via the company's website, webcast, or by telephone.

feed.title: US Bancorp CEO warns of big hit to clients from Trump's credit card cap
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp CEO Gunjan Kedia has warned that former President Trump's proposed 10% cap on credit card interest rates would severely impact over 90% of their clients, with a "crushing" effect on 50% of customers and the wider economy. The banking industry is concerned about the potential legislation, though Wall Street analysts believe it's unlikely to pass without a negotiated compromise. Kedia also expressed concerns that the reintroduction of the Credit Card Competition Act would be costly for small merchants and fail to achieve its intended goals.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty stock hits all-time high at 675.95 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty Inc. has reached an all-time high stock price of $675.95 USD, marking a 63.82% increase over the past year and nearing a $30 billion market capitalization. This performance reflects strong growth and investor confidence, though InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be overvalued. Analysts have updated price targets, citing factors like product pipelines and store performance, while the company also announced a new Executive Severance Plan.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants: Solid Execution, Working Strategies, And A More Durable Earnings Profile
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants has been upgraded to a Buy rating due to strong same-store sales growth from its core brands, Olive Garden and LongHorn Steakhouse, outperforming industry peers. The company's strategy of prioritizing value over margin, including pricing below inflation, is helping to consolidate market share and enhance brand loyalty. Partnerships like Uber Direct and menu adjustments are further driving growth, leading to an improved earnings durability despite a re-rated valuation.

feed.title: Mizuho Adjusts Price Target on Henry Schein to $81 From $74, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Henry Schein (HSIC) to $81 from $74, while reiterating a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst recent news regarding Henry Schein's distribution deals and M&A activities, reflecting an updated outlook from the analyst firm. The company specializes in the distribution of healthcare products and services, primarily dental and medical equipment, with the majority of its net sales coming from the United States.

feed.title: S&P 60 Update How Brokerages Rate BCE Inc (TSX:BCE) This Year
feed.summary: This article discusses brokerage ratings for BCE Inc. (TSX:BCE), a telecommunications and communications services company. It highlights that analyst sentiment for BCE ranges from cautious to strongly constructive, with neutral and constructive views also present. The company's profile emphasizes its Bell Media assets and national communications services.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty stock hits all-time high at 675.95 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty Inc. reached an all-time high stock price of $675.95 USD, marking a significant 63.82% increase over the past year and reflecting strong investor confidence and growth within the beauty industry. Despite this achievement, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued, with technical indicators showing overbought conditions. Analysts from Oppenheimer, Jefferies, BofA Securities, and Evercore ISI have recently updated their price targets and ratings, indicating continued strategic adjustments and evaluations for the company.

feed.title: 12 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Moving In Tuesday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 consumer discretionary stocks experiencing significant intraday movement on Tuesday, categorizing them as gainers or losers. Notable gainers include Lottery.com (SEGG) and CCH Holdings (CCHH), while Springview Holdings (SPHL) and Jeffs Brands (JFBR) are among the top losers. The report provides their current stock prices, percentage changes, and market capitalization.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Uses Solar Energy to Power 100 Percent of Daytime Las Vegas Strip Operations
feed.summary: MGM Resorts now powers 100 percent of its daytime Las Vegas Strip operations with solar energy, marking a significant step towards its goal of using 100 percent renewable electricity domestically by 2030. This achievement follows the integration of the new Escape Solar and Storage Project, which, combined with their Mega Solar Array, more than doubles the company's renewable energy access. The company can now store solar energy for use during off-peak hours, demonstrating a commitment to sustainable and cost-stable energy solutions.

feed.title: Downtown Frederick Partnership receives grant from Truist Foundation to support launch of first Retail Incubator in Downtown Frederick, MD – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: The Downtown Frederick Partnership has received a grant from Truist Foundation to launch the first Retail Incubator in Downtown Frederick, Maryland. This initiative, in partnership with SOUL Street, aims to support emerging entrepreneurs, diversify business ownership, and provide affordable retail space, mentorship, and training. The program is designed to foster long-term business viability and enrich the downtown retail mix, with the first applications opening in spring 2026.

feed.title: Keysight Collaborates with Airbus UpNext on 5G NTN SpaceRAN Demonstrator
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies is partnering with Airbus UpNext on the SpaceRAN demonstrator project, aiming to advance 5G non-terrestrial network (NTN) capabilities through software-defined satellite technology. Keysight will provide ground-based testing solutions, including satellite channel and user segment emulation, to validate seamless integration between terrestrial and non-terrestrial networks. This initiative supports European technological sovereignty in advanced connectivity and aerospace innovation, with a regenerative payload planned for an Airbus LEO satellite.

feed.title: Everest appoints new leader and COO for its Fac & Hybrid Reinsurance business
feed.summary: Everest Group has appointed Michael Cellura as Head of its Facultative & Hybrid Reinsurance division and Trevor Gallagher as Chief Operating Officer for the same business. Cellura will oversee global facultative and hybrid reinsurance strategy and portfolio management, while Gallagher will focus on operational execution and platform optimization. These appointments aim to strengthen Everest's Global Wholesale & Specialty platform and enhance its capabilities in providing flexible underwriting solutions for complex risks.

feed.title: UBER Stock Price Decreases 9% in 3 Months: Should You Buy the Dip?
feed.summary: Uber Technologies (UBER) shares have dropped 8.8% in the last three months due to concerns over competition in the robotaxi sector, particularly from Alphabet's Waymo, and high operating costs. Despite the decline, the article suggests it might be a buy opportunity for long-term investors given Uber's strong fundamentals, expansion efforts into food delivery and freight with partnerships like Best Buy and Kroger, and robust gross bookings growth in both Mobility and Delivery segments. The company also shows positive growth projections and an undervalued stock price compared to its industry.

feed.title: ESTUARY POWER ACHIEVES FINAL COMPLETION OF ESCAPE SOLAR AND STORAGE PROJECT AND BEGINS SUPPLYING MGM RESORTS INTERNATIONAL
feed.summary: Estuary Power has announced the final completion of its Escape Solar and Storage project in Lincoln County, Nevada, in December 2025. The project now supplies 185 MW of solar energy and 400 MWh of battery storage capacity to four Nevada customers, including a 25-year agreement with MGM Resorts International for 115 MW of solar and 400 MWh of battery capacity. This initiative significantly advances MGM's sustainability goals toward 100% renewable electricity domestically by 2030, with other clients including Overton Power District No. 5, Caesars Entertainment, and Wynn Las Vegas.

feed.title: Waste Management (NYSE:WM) Given New $265.00 Price Target at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Waste Management (NYSE:WM) to $265.00 from $266.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating, suggesting a 19.61% upside. This comes despite the company missing its quarterly EPS estimates slightly ($1.98 vs. $2.01 expected) but reporting a 14.9% year-over-year revenue growth. The consensus among analysts tracked by MarketBeat remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $250.41.

feed.title: DUK: Wells Fargo Lowers Duke Energy's Price Target to $115 | DUK Stock News
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Duke Energy (DUK) from $126 to $115, while maintaining an "Equal-Weight" rating. This adjustment reflects an 8.73% decrease in the target price for the energy company. Other analysts from Barclays, UBS, and JP Morgan have also recently adjusted their price targets for DUK, mostly downwards, while RBC Capital reinstated coverage with a "Sector Perform" rating.

feed.title: Forestar Group Inc (NYSE:FOR) Posts Mixed Result
feed.summary: Forestar Group Inc (NYSE:FOR) reported mixed results for the first quarter of FY26, with a 4.38% stock decline. The company's net income decreased by 7% to $15.4 million, and it sold 17% fewer lots compared to the prior-year quarter. Despite these challenges, Forestar maintained its fiscal 2026 guidance, expecting to deliver between 14,000 and 15,000 lots, generating $1.6 billion to $1.7 billion in revenue.

feed.title: Krispy Kreme’s CEO talks profitability, refranchising strategies
feed.summary: Krispy Kreme CEO Joshua Charlesworth discusses the company's turnaround strategy which began in 2025, focusing on profitability, refranchising, and sustainable revenue streams. Key components include ending its partnership with McDonald's due to unprofitability, refranchising Japanese stores, and prioritizing international growth through franchise partners. The strategy also involves optimizing U.S. operations by leveraging existing doughnut capacity and outsourcing logistics to improve efficiency and reduce debt.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on CMS Energy to $74 From $77, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for CMS Energy (NYSE: CMS) to $74 from $77, while keeping an "Equalweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after other financial institutions like JPMorgan and Barclays also recently updated their price targets for the utility company. The article also provides a brief company profile, detailing CMS Energy's operations in electricity and natural gas production and distribution.

feed.title: The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) Given New $235.00 Price Target at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has raised its price target for The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) to $235.00 from $222.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating and projecting a potential upside of 5.49%. This adjustment follows PNC's strong Q4 earnings beat, where it reported an EPS of $4.88 against an expected $4.23 and revenue of $6.07 billion surpassing estimates of $5.90 billion. Several other analysts have also increased their price targets for PNC, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $230.44.

feed.title: RSI Alert: Fidelity National Information Services Now Oversold
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services Inc (FIS) has entered oversold territory with an RSI reading of 27.6, suggesting it might be an attractive opportunity for investors. The DividendRank formula identifies FIS as a strong fundamental stock with a good valuation, and its current annualized dividend yields 2.53% based on its recent share price. This technical signal, combined with its dividend history, may indicate a potential entry point for bullish investors.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Reports Fiscal 2026 Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: D.R. Horton, Inc. announced its fiscal Q1 2026 earnings, reporting a net income of $594.8 million ($2.03 diluted EPS) and consolidated revenues of $6.9 billion, both down from the prior year. Despite a challenging market, net sales orders increased by 3%, and the company reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 guidance, including consolidated revenues of $33.5 billion to $35.0 billion and significant share repurchases and dividends.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Inc (NYSE:DHI) Profit Declines 30%
feed.summary: D.R. Horton Inc (NYSE:DHI) reported a 30% decline in net income for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, reaching $594.8 million, despite beating analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue. The homebuilder saw home sales revenues decrease by 9% and homes closed decline by 7%, but experienced a 3% increase in net sales orders. The company repurchased 4.4 million shares and maintained its fiscal 2026 guidance, projecting revenues between $33.5 billion and $35.0 billion.
